proverb_amharic: ምን ያመጣ ድሀ ምን ያሳሳ ውሃ
proverb_english: What can a poor man bring? What can water thin?
meaning_amharic: አንዳንድ ነገሮች ተፈጥሯዊ ባህሪያቸው የማይለወጥ መሆኑን ወይም አቅም የሌለው ሰው ተጽዕኖ ማሳደር እንደማይችል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Certain things have inherent natures that don't change, or it implies that someone without resources cannot bring much to the table.

proverb_english: No matter how much you forget, do not forget the week.
meaning_amharic: በህይወት ውስጥ ብዙ ነገሮች ቢረሱም፤ መሰረታዊ የሆኑ ግዴታዎችንና የጊዜ ዑደቶችን አለመዘንጋት እንደሚገባ ያስገነዝባል።
meaning_english: Even if life is distracting, one should never forget fundamental duties or the basic rhythms of life.

proverb_amharic: ምንም ቢጠም መንገድ ምንም ቢከፋ ዘመድ
proverb_english: No matter how crooked the road, no matter how bad the relative.
meaning_amharic: መንገድ ቢጠማም መድረሻው አይቀርም፤ ዘመድም ቢከፋ መተካቻ ስለሌለው መታገስና መቀበል እንደሚገባ ያሳያል።
meaning_english: Just as a winding road is still the way to your destination, family remains family regardless of their flaws; you must stick with them.

proverb_english: No matter how much they love each other, they are not buried together.
meaning_amharic: ሰው ምንም ያህል ቢዋደድ መጨረሻ ላይ ሁሉም የራሱ የሆነ ኃላፊነትና የራሱ መንገድ እንዳለው ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Despite the depth of love and companionship, everyone ultimately faces their destiny and final journey individually.

proverb_amharic: ምከረው ምከረው እምቢ ሲል መከራ ይምከረው
proverb_english: Advise him, advise him; if he refuses, let trouble advise him.
meaning_amharic: አንድ ሰው በምክር ሊመለስ ካልቻለ፤ በሚገጥመው ችግርና መከራ እንዲማር መተው እንደሚሻል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: If someone refuses to listen to good advice, they will eventually learn the hard way through the consequences of their actions.

proverb_english: One who has nowhere to go creates many exits.
meaning_amharic: ግልጽ አቅጣጫ የሌለው ሰው ብዙ አማራጮችን ለመሞከር እንደሚባክን ወይም መድረሻ ሲጠፋ መውጫ መፈለግ እንደሚበዛ ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: A person without a clear destination often wastes energy trying many different paths or looking for escapes when they lack direction.

proverb_english: Let beauty be lost, if supported by a good name.
meaning_amharic: ከመልክ ይልቅ ስምና ዝና (ባህሪ) የበለጠ ዋጋ እንዳለው፤ መልክ ቢጠፋ እንኳን ጥሩ ባህሪ ሰውን እንደሚያስከብር ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Character and reputation are far more valuable than physical beauty; a good name sustains a person even if they lack outward attractiveness.

proverb_english: The 'ugly' one put the beauty to shame.
meaning_amharic: መልከ ጥፉ የሆነች ሴት በትጋቷ ወይም በባህሪዋ ቆንጆ የተባለችውን ልትበልጣት እንደምትችል ያሳያል። ዋናው ቁምነገር መልክ አለመሆኑን ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Inner virtue or hard work can outshine mere physical beauty, proving that substance is more important than appearance.

proverb_english: A good husband tames a bad wife.
meaning_amharic: የባል ጥሩነትና ትዕግስት መጥፎ ባህሪ ያላትን ሴት ሊለውጣትና ሊያስተካክላት እንደሚችል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: The positive influence, patience, and kindness of a good husband can improve a wife's difficult character.

proverb_english: A good wife is a crown to her husband.
meaning_amharic: ባህሪዋ ያማረና ታታሪ የሆነች ሚስት ለባሏ ክብርና ኩራት መሆኗን ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: A virtuous and capable wife brings honor, dignity, and pride to her husband's life.

proverb_english: A good name lives beyond the grave.
meaning_amharic: ሰው ከሞተ በኋላ ስራውና ዝናው በምድር ላይ ለረጅም ጊዜ ተከብሮ እንደሚቆይ ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: A person's legacy and reputation survive long after their physical death; doing good ensures you are remembered.

proverb_english: Advice is a provision for the one who listens.
meaning_amharic: ጥሩ ምክርን ሰምቶ የሚቀበል ሰው ለህይወቱ የሚጠቅመውን ስንቅ እንደያዘ ይቆጠራል።
meaning_english: Good advice acts as a valuable resource for those who are willing to listen and apply it to their lives.
